mapper.sql: CASE WHEN rr.dorm_area_snapshot IS NULL OR rr.dorm_area_snapshot = '' THEN CONCAT(rr.building_no_snapshot, '-', rr.room_no_snapshot) ELSE CONCAT(rr.dorm_area_snapshot, ' ', rr.building_no_snapshot, '-', rr.room_no_snapshot) END
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT work_order_id, MAX(created_at) AS latest_recorded_at FROM work_order_records GROUP BY work_order_id ) activity ON activity.work_order_id = wo.id
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests), 0) AS total_requests, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE status = 'SUBMITTED'), 0) AS pending_review_requests, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders WHERE status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS')), 0) AS active_work_orders, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION'), 0) AS pending_confirmation_count, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE status = 'REWORK_IN_PROGRESS'), 0) AS rework_in_progress_count, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND DATE_FORMAT(completed_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS completed_this_month, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests rr LEFT JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.repair_request_id = rr.id WHERE (rr.status = 'SUBMITTED' AND rr.submitted_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rr.submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 HOUR)) OR (wo.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND wo.assigned_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR) AND wo.assigned_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) OR (wo.status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') AND COALESCE(wo.accepted_at, wo.assigned_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND COALESCE(wo.accepted_at, wo.assigned_at) >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR)) ), 0) AS timeout_warning_count, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests rr LEFT JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.repair_request_id = rr.id WHERE (rr.status = 'SUBMITTED' AND rr.submitted_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 HOUR)) OR (wo.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND wo.assigned_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) OR (wo.status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') AND COALESCE(wo.accepted_at, wo.assigned_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR)) ), 0) AS timeout_overdue_count FROM dual

SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE student_id = #{studentId}), 0) AS total_requests, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 'SUBMITTED'), 0) AS pending_review_requests, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders wo INNER JOIN repair_requests rr ON rr.id = wo.repair_request_id WHERE rr.student_id = #{studentId} AND wo.status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') ), 0) AS active_work_orders, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION'), 0) AS pending_confirmation_count, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 'REWORK_IN_PROGRESS'), 0) AS rework_in_progress_count, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND DATE_FORMAT(completed_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS completed_this_month, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests rr LEFT JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.repair_request_id = rr.id WHERE rr.student_id = #{studentId} AND ((rr.status = 'SUBMITTED' AND rr.submitted_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rr.submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 HOUR)) OR (wo.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND wo.assigned_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR) AND wo.assigned_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) OR (rr.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'REWORK_IN_PROGRESS') AND COALESCE(wo.accepted_at, wo.assigned_at, rr.submitted_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND COALESCE(wo.accepted_at, wo.assigned_at, rr.submitted_at) >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR))) ), 0) AS timeout_warning_count, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests rr LEFT JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.repair_request_id = rr.id WHERE rr.student_id = #{studentId} AND ((rr.status = 'SUBMITTED' AND rr.submitted_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 HOUR)) OR (wo.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND wo.assigned_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) OR (rr.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'REWORK_IN_PROGRESS') AND COALESCE(wo.accepted_at, wo.assigned_at, rr.submitted_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR))) ), 0) AS timeout_overdue_count FROM dual

SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT wo.repair_request_id) FROM work_orders wo WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId}), 0) AS total_requests, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders wo WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} AND wo.status = 'ASSIGNED'), 0) AS pending_review_requests, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders wo WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} AND wo.status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS')), 0) AS active_work_orders, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders wo WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} AND wo.status = 'WAITING_CONFIRMATION'), 0) AS pending_confirmation_count, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders wo INNER JOIN repair_requests rr ON rr.id = wo.repair_request_id WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} AND rr.status = 'REWORK_IN_PROGRESS' AND wo.status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') ), 0) AS rework_in_progress_count, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders wo WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} AND wo.status = 'COMPLETED' AND DATE_FORMAT(wo.completed_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS completed_this_month, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders wo WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} AND ((wo.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND wo.assigned_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR) AND wo.assigned_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) OR (wo.status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') AND COALESCE(wo.accepted_at, wo.assigned_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND COALESCE(wo.accepted_at, wo.assigned_at) >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR))) ), 0) AS timeout_warning_count, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders wo WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} AND ((wo.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND wo.assigned_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) OR (wo.status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') AND COALESCE(wo.accepted_at, wo.assigned_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR))) ), 0) AS timeout_overdue_count FROM dual

SELECT rr.id, rr.request_no, rr.student_name, AS location_text, rr.fault_category, rr.status, COALESCE(activity.latest_recorded_at, wo.assigned_at, rr.submitted_at) AS submitted_at, wo.assigned_at AS assignedAt, wo.accepted_at AS acceptedAt FROM repair_requests rr LEFT JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.repair_request_id = rr.id
ORDER BY COALESCE(activity.latest_recorded_at, wo.assigned_at, rr.submitted_at) DESC, rr.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT rr.id, rr.request_no, rr.student_name, AS location_text, rr.fault_category, rr.status, COALESCE(activity.latest_recorded_at, wo.assigned_at, rr.submitted_at) AS submitted_at, wo.assigned_at AS assignedAt, wo.accepted_at AS acceptedAt FROM work_orders wo INNER JOIN repair_requests rr ON rr.id = wo.repair_request_id
WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} ORDER BY COALESCE(activity.latest_recorded_at, wo.assigned_at, rr.submitted_at) DESC, wo.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT rr.id, rr.request_no, rr.student_name, AS location_text, rr.fault_category, rr.status, rr.submitted_at, wo.assigned_at AS assignedAt, wo.accepted_at AS acceptedAt FROM repair_requests rr LEFT JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.repair_request_id = rr.id WHERE rr.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY rr.submitted_at DESC, rr.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
